title: Squamellaria wilkinsonii
taxonomy: Squamellaria wilkinsonii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. It belongs to the genus Squamellaria and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been placed in the family Theaceae by some sources, but the Clusiaceae classification is more widely accepted. Squamellaria wilkinsonii is a type of epiphytic orchid, although it is not a true orchid. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
uses: Squamellaria wilkinsonii has been reported to have potential medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
